summary: Mission v14.6 Testing Complete - Recherche par mots-clés et stabilité campagnes. All 16/16 backend tests passed. UI features verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ CoachVitrine.js Lines 241-243, 833-852: Champ de recherche (loupe) avec offerSearch state, data-testid='offer-search-input'
✅ CoachVitrine.js Lines 863-910: Filtrage par nom, description ou keywords avec message 'Aucune offre ne correspond'
✅ OffersManager.js Lines 222-233: Champ Mots-clés avec data-testid='offer-keywords'
✅ Backend server.py Lines 430, 447: Offer model avec keywords field
✅ scheduler_engine.py Lines 406, 431, 480: mediaUrl traité pour campagnes programmées
✅ CRMSection.js Lines 670-685: Bulles colorées (Client=gray-700 GAUCHE, Coach/IA=#D91CD2 DROITE)
✅ PromoCodesTab.js Lines 458-470: Bouton Copier avec feedback visuel (CopyIcon -> CheckIcon)
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed offers created and deleted for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v14.6 fully verified. New features: 1) CoachVitrine search field (offer-search-input) with filtering by name/description/keywords, 2) OffersManager keywords field (offer-keywords), 3) Backend keywords support in Offer model, 4) mediaUrl handling in scheduler_engine for scheduled campaigns, 5) All v14.5 features still working (CRM bubble colors, fr-CH dates, document.title, badge Session Active, copy promo codes). Anti-regression: 8 contacts, 3 offers minimum confirmed.

backend_api: Create offer with keywords (PASSED - created and deleted)
frontend_ui: Triple-click footer opens login modal (PASSED - Connexion Partenaire modal)
Search filtering works - 'cours' shows matching offers (PASSED)
No results message 'Aucune offre ne correspond' (PASSED)
3 offers visible (Cours à l'unité, Carte 10 cours, Abonnement 1 mois)
